title: 皐月賞の後に・忍び寄る鬼

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heated race comes to an end. Winning
Ticket, having defeated Biwa Hayahide and
Narita Taishin, reflects on her triumph.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, she is worried about the
growing threat of Taishin and her fierce sprinting
ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shaking off her uneasiness, Ticket forces herself
to focus squarely on the Japanese Derby, where
she can't afford to lose.
